summary: W944 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while consolidating W943 target-difference surjectivity and target-codomain no-univ compactness primitives into a W715-style target no-univ provider. The route projects W944 target data back to W943, then delegates through the W943/W942/W941/W940/W937/W936/W935/W934/W933/W932/W931/W930 route stack. Product success remains false because the W944 leaves are still explicit assumptions, and the original four-task completion witness and review packet remain incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W944 refines W943 by replacing target-difference surjectivity and target-codomain no-univ compactness primitives with a target no-univ provider, while that provider and the rest of the W944 leaves are still not instantiated.

W944 is still a closed-map branch route. The W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W944 fields include W716 boundary data, W717 relation data, W944 target no-univ data, W725 closedness branch data, W719 normalized fixed-target data, W722 source-triangulation data, one endpoint strictShortExact witness field, bounded-homotopy localized right-adjoint fields, and the component-level unit mapping-cone witness.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract product-success evidence, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
